findings.description: Section s5 has an empty title string. The source has a clear heading 「ロガーファクトリの設定」 for this content.
findings.source_evidence: Source heading: 「ロガーファクトリの設定」 under 「プロパティファイルの記述ルール」

findings.description: Section s7 has an empty title string. The source has clear headings for FileLogWriterの設定、SynchronousFileLogWriterの設定、BasicLogFormatterの設定.
findings.source_evidence: Source headings: 「FileLogWriterの設定」「SynchronousFileLogWriterの設定」「BasicLogFormatterの設定」

findings.description: Section s6 uses the parent section title 「プロパティファイルの記述ルール」, but the content only covers the subsections 「ログライタの設定」 and 「ロガーの設定」, which are under the sub-heading 「フレームワーク実装の設定」. The parent title is misleadingly assigned to a partial subsection.
findings.source_evidence: Source structure: 「プロパティファイルの記述ルール」(---) → 「ロガーファクトリの設定」(===) + 「フレームワーク実装の設定」(===) → 「ログライタの設定」/「ロガーの設定」/etc. s6 only covers 「ログライタの設定」+「ロガーの設定」 but claims the parent's title.

findings.description: Section s7 covers SynchronousFileLogWriter properties but the hints are missing the failure code property names: failureCodeCreateLockFile, failureCodeReleaseLockFile, failureCodeForceDeleteLockFile, failureCodeInterruptLockWait. Also missing: encoding (FileLogWriter property).
findings.source_evidence: Source table for SynchronousFileLogWriter includes: writer.<名称>.failureCodeCreateLockFile, failureCodeReleaseLockFile, failureCodeForceDeleteLockFile, failureCodeInterruptLockWait. FileLogWriter table includes: writer.<名称>.encoding.
